title: Hot-Reload Resource Packs
description: Reloads resource packs when changes to the resourcepacks folder are made.
body:
For Fabric. NeoForge version requires [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)

Reloads resource packs when changes to the resourcepacks folder are made. Useful for resource pack developers who are tired of using F3+t, and allows immediately viewing changes on one monitor without leaving your editor.

This is meant to be a very **simple** zero-configuration mod. **For an arguably better experience**, consider checking out https://modrinth.com/mod/scaldinghot
